sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66447" key="mesokrinh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσο-κρῐνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n66447.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">parting in the middle</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μ.</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κίων</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pillar left as a support in working mines</tr_>, in pl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.843d</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.87</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
